name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.81 Spending Plan defaults and projection cleanup
label: Spending Plan defaults and projection cleanup
release_notes: Adds default Spending Plan setup rows, improves projections around account balances and pay timing, fixes raw HTML rendering in projections, and makes wizard navigation buttons consistent.
notes: Income, Spending and AP starter rows are now created automatically when needed. Projections pull income/outflow data from the live Spending Plan and ask only for pay timing, balances, targets and weekly projection amounts.
release_name: Spending Plan defaults and projection cleanup
